generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our current alliance commitments are actually making us LESS secure? By spreading our forces thin across multiple alliances, we're weakening our ability to defend ourselves effectively. Instead of being tied down by outdated agreements, we should focus on strengthening our own defenses and building strategic partnerships that truly benefit us. #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartDefense
